data.title: Iran and Oman to Charge Fees for Ships Passing Through Strait of Hormuz
data.description: A regional official has disclosed a two-week ceasefire plan that includes provisions for Iran and Oman to impose fees on vessels navigating the Strait of Hormuz. According to ChainCatcher, this development follows discussions aimed at easing tensions in the region. The strategic waterway is a critical passage for global oil shipments, and the introduction of fees could have significant implications for international trade.

data.title: Market Conditions Mirror 2019, Says Liquid Capital Founder
data.description:
Liquid Capital founder Yi Lihua recently shared insights on social media, noting similarities between the current market environment and that of 2019. According to Odaily, he highlighted a decrease in liquidity in the secondary market, a lack of confidence in primary investments, and increased personnel movement within the industry.

Yi Lihua suggested that during cautious market sentiment phases, focusing on bottom-fishing in the secondary market and primary investments might become key areas of interest. He also mentioned that similar strategies in 2019 led to significant outcomes in subsequent market trends.

data.title: Bitcoin Hashrate in Iran Drops Significantly Amid Global Stability
data.description: Iran's Bitcoin hashrate experienced a significant decline of approximately 77% over the past quarter, dropping to around 2 EH/s after losing about 7 EH/s. According to NS3.AI, this information was reported by Ian Philpot from Luxor Technology, who noted that the disruption was localized to Iran and did not pose a threat to the global network's continuity. The global hashrate remains close to 1,000 EH/s. Additionally, the report highlighted that the 30-day average global hashrate decreased by 5.8% quarter over quarter, as lower Bitcoin prices led to older mining equipment being taken offline.

data.title: Lighter: Has repurchased 10 million LITs, representing 4% of the circulating supply.
data.description: Lighter officially stated in an article on X that it has repurchased 10 million LIT tokens since TGE, representing 4% of the circulating supply.

data.title: The US SOL spot ETF saw a net outflow of $15.402 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (April 7th, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of SOL spot ETFs was $15.402 million. The SOL spot ETF with the largest net outflow yesterday was the Bitwise Solana Staking ETF (BSOL), with a net outflow of $13.3409 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $779 million. The second largest was the Grayscale Solana Trust (GSOL), with a net outflow of $1.8222 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $104 million. As of press time, the total net asset value of SOL spot ETFs is $776 million, the SOL net asset ratio is 1.65%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached $965 million.

data.title: The US XRP spot ETF saw a total net inflow of $3.3202 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, XRP spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $3.3202 million yesterday (April 7th, Eastern Time). The XRP spot ETF with the largest net inflow yesterday was the Bitwise XRP ETF (XRP), with a net inflow of $1.9005 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $380 million. The second largest was the Franklin XRP ETF (XRPZ), with a net inflow of $1.4197 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $323 million. As of press time, the total net asset value of XRP spot ETFs was $922 million, with an XRP net asset ratio of 1.14%, and a cumulative historical net inflow of $1.211 billion.

data.title: US media: Iran and Oman will impose "passage fees" on the Strait of Hormuz during the ceasefire.
data.description: A regional official revealed that the two-week ceasefire plan includes allowing Iran and Oman to charge tolls for ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz. (Associated Press)

data.title: Altcoin Season Index Rises to 34, Indicating Shift in Market Dynamics
data.description: CoinMarketCap's Altcoin Season Index has increased to 34, marking a two-point rise from the previous day. According to NS3.AI, this index evaluates the performance of the top 100 cryptocurrencies, excluding stablecoins and wrapped tokens, against Bitcoin over a 90-day period. The recent uptick suggests a shift in market dynamics, with altcoins gaining traction relative to Bitcoin.

data.title: CZ: Never seriously considered acquiring FTX, and has little interest in helping SBF.
data.description: In his autobiography, *Freedom of Money*, Binance founder CZ stated that during communications prior to Binance's attempted acquisition of FTX in November 2022, Sam Bankman-Fried requested billions of dollars in funding, but he never intended to actually pursue the deal from the outset. CZ claimed that the letter of intent he signed was merely a non-binding formality, used only by the team for data evaluation without any commitments. He also believes the key turning point in FTX's collapse was Alameda's former CEO, Caroline Ellison's offer to buy back FTT at $22, which exposed a price floor and triggered short selling, resulting in an outflow of approximately $6 billion in a short period. Furthermore, CZ mentioned an industry communication group created by former FTX executives, whose members included heads of multiple trading platforms. This group subsequently attracted the attention of US regulators, but he stated that no collusion or market manipulation was found. (CoinDesk)

data.title: European Stock Futures Surge with DAX and FTSE 100 Leading Gains
data.description: European stock futures experienced significant gains as the German DAX index futures surged by 4.2%, while the UK's FTSE 100 index futures rose by 2.4%. According to ChainCatcher, these increases reflect a positive shift in market sentiment. The rise in futures indicates investor optimism and potential upward momentum in European markets.

data.title: Polymarket Predicts Hormuz Strait Traffic Normalization by April 30
data.description:
The probability of the Hormuz Strait's shipping traffic returning to normal by April 30 has risen to approximately 57% on Polymarket, marking a 43% increase over the past 24 hours. According to Odaily, the current trading volume for this market is around $4.07 million.

The market uses IMF PortWatch data as the basis for settlement. A 'Yes' outcome is determined if the seven-day moving average of transiting vessels reaches or exceeds 60 on any day within the market period. The statistics include container ships, bulk carriers, roll-on/roll-off ships, general cargo ships, and tankers, with only data recorded by the IMF PortWatch system being counted.

Previously, Iran's Foreign Minister stated that the strait could be safely navigated within the next two weeks under Iranian coordination.

data.title: BlackRock withdrew 2,607 BTC and 28,391 ETH from Coinbase.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, BlackRock withdrew 2,607 BTC from Coinbase, worth approximately $178 million, and 28,391 ETH, worth approximately $59 million.

data.title: KOSPI Trading Curbs Triggered After Index Surge
data.description: A buy-side trading curb was activated on the KOSPI following a significant increase in the index. According to NS3.AI, this measure was implemented to stabilize the market and prevent excessive volatility. The trading curb is a regulatory mechanism designed to temporarily restrict buying activities when there is a rapid rise in stock prices, ensuring orderly market conditions. This action reflects the market's sensitivity to sudden movements and aims to maintain investor confidence.

data.title: GSR Invests in Libeara to Expand Tokenization Platform
data.description: GSR is spearheading an investment in Libeara, a tokenization platform backed by Standard Chartered, which has facilitated over $1 billion in on-chain assets. According to NS3.AI, this partnership aligns with GSR's strategic acquisitions of Autonomous and Architech, as the firm aims to develop a comprehensive token and real-world asset (RWA) capital markets business. The terms of the deal have not been disclosed.

data.title: Polymarket's probability that "navigation in the Strait of Hormuz will return to normal by April 30" briefly rose to 57%, a 43% increase in 24 hours.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer, the probability of the Strait of Hormuz returning to normal traffic flow by April 30th has risen to approximately 57% on Polymarket, a 24-hour increase of about 43%, with current trading volume around $4.07 million. This market uses IMF PortWatch data for settlement; a "yes" result is defined as a 7-day moving average of 60 or more vessels passing through the Strait on any day within the market cycle, and a "no" result otherwise. The statistics include container ships, bulk carriers, roll-on/roll-off ships, general cargo ships, and tankers, and only data recorded by the IMF PortWatch system is considered. Previous news: Iranian Foreign Minister: With Iranian coordination, the Strait will be safe for passage within the next two weeks. Odaily Seer continues to monitor the forecast market, seeing changes before pricing.

data.title: The U.S. Department of Defense will hold a press conference tomorrow regarding its actions against Iran.
data.description: The U.S. Department of Defense is scheduled to hold a press conference at 8:00 a.m. local time tomorrow regarding its actions against Iran. (Jin Shi)

data.title: Spot gold surged $130 during the day, while spot silver rose 5.1%.
data.description: According to Gate.com data, spot gold surged $130 today, currently trading at $4836.88 per ounce, a gain of 2.8%. Spot silver is currently trading at $76.65 per ounce, up 5.1% on the day.

data.title: "Set 10 major targets first," close out long positions in BTC and ETH, accumulating profits exceeding $12 million.
data.description: Trader @Jason60704294, who goes by the username "Set 10 Big Targets First," announced on social media that he has closed his long positions in BTC and ETH, choosing to take profits and exit the market. He disclosed that his 4x leveraged long BTC position yielded a profit of approximately $12.12 million, and his 2x leveraged long ETH position yielded a profit of approximately $728,000, for a total profit exceeding $12 million.

data.title: Pakistan Invites Iran and U.S. for Talks in Islamabad
data.description: Pakistan's Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has extended an invitation to Iranian and U.S. delegations to hold discussions in Islamabad. According to Odaily, Sharif announced that a ceasefire between Iran and the U.S. would take effect at 3:30 a.m. Iranian time on the 8th, which corresponds to 8 a.m. UTC+8.

data.title: US crude oil fell below $95, with a daily drop of over 15%.
data.description: Gate.com data shows that XTIUSD (US crude oil) has fallen below 95 USD and is currently trading at 95.6 USD, with the intraday decline widening to 15%.
